# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  functionAppName: 'functionappname'
  location: 'eastus'
  storageAccountName: 'storageaccountname'
  keyVaultName: 'keyvaultname'
  sqlServerName: 'sqlservername'
  cosmosDbAccountName: 'cosmosdbaccountname'
  cosmosDbDatabaseName: 'cosmosdbdatabasename'
  cosmosDbContainerName: 'cosmosdbcontainername'

variables:
  functionPlanName: $(parameters.functionAppName)FunctionsPlan
  functionAppServicePlan: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/$(variables.functionPlanName)
  storageAccount: [
    type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts',
    apiVersion: '2019-04-01',
    name: $(parameters.storageAccountName)
  ]
  keyVault: [
    type: 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults',
    apiVersion: '2016-10-01',
    name: $(parameters.keyVaultName)
  ]
  sqlServer: [
    type: 'Microsoft.Sql/servers',
    apiVersion: '2014-04-01-preview',
    name: $(parameters.sqlServerName)
  ]
  cosmosDbAccount: [
    type: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts',
    apiVersion: '2015-06-30',
    name: $(parameters.cosmosDbAccountName)
  ]
  cosmosDbDatabase: [
    type: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/databases',
    apiVersion: '2015-06-30',
    name: '<$(parameters.cosmosDbAccountName)/$(parameters.cosmosDbDatabaseName)'
  ]
  cosmosDbContainer: [
    type: 'Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/databases/containers',
    apiVersion: '2015-06-30',
    name: '<$(parameters.cosmosDbAccountName)/$(parameters.cosmosDbDatabaseName)/$(parameters.cosmosDbContainerName)'
  ]

resources:
  - type: 'Microsoft.Web/serverfarms'
    apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    name: $(variables.functionPlanName)
    properties:
      location: $(parameters.location)
      reserved: true
      sku: Y1
      workerSize: 1
      osType: linux
      identity:
        type: SystemAssigned

  - type: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
    apiVersion: '2019-08-01'
    name: $(parameters.functionAppName)
    properties:
      serverFarmId: $(variables.functionPlanName)
      siteConfig:
        linuxFxVersion: DOCKER|dotnet:5.0
      identity:
        type: SystemAssigned
        userAssignedIdentities: {}

  - type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
    apiVersion: '2018-10-01-preview'
    name: 'storageContributor-$(parameters.functionAppName)'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/490f8c23-9cd6-4a8b-a98c-35da73d1aad5'
      principals:
        type: AzureADPrincipal
        objectsId: ['(principal ID of your managed identity)']

  - type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
    apiVersion: '2018-10-01-preview'
    name: 'keyVaultContributor-$(parameters.functionAppName)'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/a3faf447-e9ab-4cdb-a5ff-268deec6e1c5'
      principals:
        type: AzureADPrincipal
        objectsId: ['(principal ID of your managed identity)']

  - type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
    apiVersion: '2018-10-01-preview'
    name: 'SQL Server Contributor-$(parameters.functionAppName)'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b34ddb7a-55a8-4c2f-9d19-4990e16b0dfd'
      principals:
        type: AzureADPrincipal
        objectsId: ['(principal ID of your managed identity)']

  - type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
    apiVersion: '2018-10-01-preview'
    name: 'Cosmos DB Data Contributor-$(parameters.functionAppName)'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/752cf240-47b4-4e2c-9a63-88ab1958d3bd'
      principals:
        type: AzureADPrincipal
        objectsId: ['(principal ID of your managed identity)']
